{"query":"Keir Starmer remain MP after resigning prime minister labour leader June 2026 confirmation","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1400,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/live/ce370d8l1jvt","title":"Starmer tells MPs 'this is the end of my political journey' as he gets applause at final PMQs - BBC News","content":"The Tory leader promised to give Starmer a gentler time than he had given Boris Johnson during his last PMQs - there was "a conciliatory and human tone" between the pair, writes our Political Editor Chris Mason.
NHS waiting lists down - The overall number of waits for treatment in England in April was 7.22 million, down from 7.62 million in June 2024, a decrease of 400,000.
Boris Johnson - Resigning as PM in 2022 following a number of scandals, including partygate, Johnson remained a back-bench MP for less than a year before leaving Parliament in June 2023
Some of his predecessors have stepped down as MPs shortly after resigning as prime minister - see Tony Blair and David Cameron - however, Starmer insisted he would be staying on as the MP for the north London constituency of Holborn and St Pancras.
Keir Starmer now faces his final question at Prime Minister's Questions from Labour MP Carolyn Harris.
"Politics is not a joke," Kruger says, adding that every major party has supported Count Binface, a "comedian with a dustbin on his head", to stand against Reform leader Nigel Farage."},{"url":"https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/7/15/starmer-bids-mps-goodbye-as-british-pm-and-pledges-to-support-his-successor","title":"Starmer bids MPs goodbye as British PM and pledges to support his successor | Politics News | Al Jazeera","content":"Outgoing British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has promised to give his “wholehearted support” to his successor, Andy Burnham, in an emotional appearance in the House of Commons as he prepares to hand over his premiership.
“This is the end of my political journey,” he said."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yzynxwk05o","title":"Starmer says it's the 'end of my political journey' at his final Prime Minister's Questions","content":"Labour MP Carolyn Harris was also overcome by emotion as she told MPs that "every day we see his decency and his courage shine through".
Sir Keir is due to hand over power to Andy Burnham on Monday, after the former Greater Manchester mayor is confirmed as Labour leader at a special Labour conference on Friday.
Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch refrained from attacking the outgoing PM's record, instead praising him for his work on Ukraine and his friendship with the country's President, Volodymyr Zelensky.
However, it began on a sombre note with Sir Keir paying tribute to former MP Ann Widdecombe.
Sir Keir also thanked Badenoch for her kindness following the death of his brother and after an arson attack on his family home.
Liberal Democrat MP Will Forster asked Sir Keir if his last act would be to declare a bank holiday if England wins the World Cup.
Lib Dem leader Sir Ed said he could not "back joke figures with ridiculous policies" adding: "Which is why I'm supporting Count Binface.""},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/politics/2026/jun/24/keir-starmer-to-stay-labour-mp","title":"Keir Starmer to stay on as MP but unlikely to want cabinet role | Keir Starmer | The Guardian","content":"Keir Starmer will remain the MP for Holborn and St Pancras after standing down as prime minister, Downing Street has confirmed."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c07y74d8y51o","title":"Watch: Starmer signs off final PMQs to standing ovation","content":"Sir Keir Starmer received a standing ovation from his party and other MPs after giving his final answer at his last Prime Minister's Questions.
Andy Burnham is set to become Labour leader later this week, and is expected to take office as prime minister on 20 July."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Keir Starmer remain MP after resigning prime minister labour leader June 2026 confirmation","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.npr.org/2026/06/22/nx-s1-5866231/keir-starmer-resigns","title":"U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation : NPR","content":"**U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation** **Prime Minister Keir Starmer is stepping down. His likely successor, Andy Burnham, a popular former mayor, would become the U.K.'s seventh prime minister in 10 years.**. # Keir Starmer has resigned, paving way for a 7th U.K. prime minister in 10 years. #### UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer gives a speech outside 10 Downing Street announcing his resignation following mounting political pressure in London, on Monday. LONDON — British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has resigned as leader of the United Kingdom's governing Labour Party, clearing a path for the country's seventh prime minister in a decade. ### Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. So Burnham could run for the Labour Party leadership — and ultimately prime minister — uncontested, and enter office in late July. ### British Voters Choose the Labour Party and Sir Keir Starmer as Prime Minister.","score":0.7380092,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://commonslibrary.parliament.uk/research-briefings/cbp-10840","title":"How is the Prime Minister appointed? - House of Commons Library","content":"Sir Keir Starmer has announced his intention to resign as Prime Minister once a successor as leader of the Labour Party has been chosen. If a Prime Minister chooses to resign when their administration has an overall majority (as in 2022 – twice – and June 2026), the practice is for the party in government (and its members) to identify who can be chosen as the successor, by whatever means internal party rules stipulate. If an incumbent Prime Minister’s party wins an overall majority in a general election (as in December 2019), then they continue in office, their “authority” being “unbroken”, although by custom they will seek an audience with the Monarch. If an election results in an overall majority for a different party (as in July 2024), then the incumbent Prime Minister resigns, and the Monarch invites the winning party’s leader to form a government.","score":0.7055624,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxd00lg599o","title":"Keir Starmer announces resignation as prime minister and Labour Party ...","content":"# Starmer quits as Labour leader and paves way for contest for new prime minister. Sir Keir Starmer has said he will quit as Labour Party leader, paving the way for a contest to decide a new prime minister. Speaking in Downing Street, Sir Keir said he accepted he was not best placed to lead Labour into the next general election and he had informed King Charles III of his decision to step down. He said if there was a contest then a new leader would be in place before Parliament returned in September, and he would \"do everything\" he could to ensure an \"orderly\" transition of power. Sir Keir said he would remain as prime minister until the leadership contest was complete. Burnham announced on Monday that he would put himself forward as a candidate in the leadership contest, before he boarded a train to London to take his parliamentary seat.","score":0.6783488,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/International/uk-prime-minister-keir-starmer-resign/story?id=134087581","title":"UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation","content":"Jun 22, 2026 — Starmer, who had led Labour since 2020, was elected to lead the country in a general election 2024.
